title: Seed script imports runtime packages that are absent from package.json
reasoning: The seed script depends on bcryptjs and dotenv, but neither package is declared in dependencies or devDependencies. In a clean install, after the module-format issue is addressed or if the script is run in CommonJS mode, module resolution will fail with MODULE_NOT_FOUND before any seed data can be inserted.
reproduction: Install from package.json in a clean environment and run the seed entrypoint after resolving the ESM/CommonJS mismatch; Node cannot resolve bcryptjs or dotenv.
recommendation: Add bcryptjs and dotenv to package.json dependencies if this seed script is intended to run in deployed/runtime environments, or devDependencies if it is strictly a local development tool.
whyTestsDoNotAlreadyCoverThis: There are no linked tests or package scripts that execute the seed file in a clean dependency environment.
suggestedRegressionTest: Add a seed smoke test or CI check that installs from package.json and loads the seed entrypoint.
minimumFixScope: Update package.json dependency declarations for the packages imported by src/seeds/seed.js.
